commands.review_summary:
The PR narrows embedded session initialization resets from no assistant message to no messages, archives header-only resets, adds focused regression tests, and adds a shell verification wrapper.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows an existing transcript with a session header plus a user message and no assistant reply flows through run/attempt into prepareSessionManagerForRun and matches the current !hasAssistant reset branch.
commands.review_followup: External after-fix proof is missing and the PR has security/correctness blockers, so it needs contributor or maintainer amendment before merge.

target.title: fix(session): preserve mid-turn messages on gateway restart
